missions.name: Magnetosphere Buoy Reboot
missions.description: A Society magnetosphere buoy is glitching under Jupiter's radiation belt. EVA across, flash the rad-hardened firmware, bring back the billable data logs.

missions.name: Io Torus Sulfur Probe
missions.description: A sulfur-monitoring probe in the Io plasma torus is offline. Replace the analyzer before Vance loses the moon traffic forecast.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: A Society orbital asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics are inconclusive, so Vance wants eyes on the hardware.

missions.name: Galilean Telescope Phasing
missions.description: The moon-watching telescope is out of phase after a radiation flush. Walk each segment in by hand before the forecasts lose value.
